title: Evangelion box set choice
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion box set choice!             Quote Post by tamashii » Sat Oct 17, 2009 12:30 am Hey guys! I want to get some opinions on this... I'm going to buy the Evangelion DVD box set, but I can't decide which one. They're both the same price. My choices are either the Platinum Complete collection, which is the set released in 2005 with the picture of Ayanami on the box, OR the 2007 Platinum Perfect Collection, which is the metal tin set, with the extras. I won't watch the extras (don't even watch the dub), so the Platinum Complete seems like the better choice ... but that tin! The other difference I can see is that the individual DVD cases on the Tin version have more smaller, more obscured artwork on each one because of the huge "Neon Genesis Evangelion" titling on them. Anyone have an opinion on this? .. what do you guys think I should get? Also..doubt it, but wondering if there's any improvement on the video transfer for the slightly newer 2007 one? Perhaps bringing it closer to Renewal standards?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Sat Oct 17, 2009 3:46 am I don't really know which one of those 2 is better, but have you considered the thinpak? [url]http://www.evamonkey.com/reviews_platinum_thinpak.php[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Oct 17, 2009 9:18 am check out this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7703

[]:             Quote Post by tamashii » Sat Oct 17, 2009 1:52 pm Ornette wrote: check out this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7703

Article: Evangelion box set choice
[]: Evangelion box set choice!             Quote Post by tamashii » Sat Oct 17, 2009 12:30 am Hey guys! I want to get some opinions on this... I'm going to buy the Evangelion DVD box set, but I can't decide which one. They're both the same price. My choices are either the Platinum Complete collection, which is the set released in 2005 with the picture of Ayanami on the box, OR the 2007 Platinum Perfect Collection, which is the metal tin set, with the extras. I won't watch the extras (don't even watch the dub), so the Platinum Complete seems like the better choice ... but that tin! The other difference I can see is that the individual DVD cases on the Tin version have more smaller, more obscured artwork on each one because of the huge "Neon Genesis Evangelion" titling on them. Anyone have an opinion on this? .. what do you guys think I should get? Also..doubt it, but wondering if there's any improvement on the video transfer for the slightly newer 2007 one? Perhaps bringing it closer to Renewal standards?
